description_long: This apartment building features a boxy, modern design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade is predominantly white with black and gray accents, and the structure is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a central entrance. The ground level includes a main doorway and several small windows, while the upper floor has larger windows, suggesting residential units. Small green patches at the base hint at minimal landscaping or planters. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and metal framing. Its compact footprint and simple, functional design are typical of contemporary urban apartment complexes.
description: A modern, boxy apartment building with a flat roof, white facade, and symmetrical window arrangement. Black and gray accents and minimal landscaping complete its contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and central black accent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, solid white walls, and minimal window presence.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar window arrangement to the front, plus visible green landscaping at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with solid white walls and few windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on both floors, with even spacing and alignment across the facade.
